sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16730" key="a)sugki/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσυγκίνητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n16730.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without agitation,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:21:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
